title: Metagraphed Entity Label
description: Community-contributable label for a known ss58 address (exchange/foundation/operator/other) -- one file per address, same single-file-per-entity shape as registry/providers/<slug>.json. Every claim needs an independent source_urls proof, matching subnet surfaces' own convention; the public-safety scan applies identically.

ss58.description: The labeled address. Must match this file's own name (registry/entities/<ss58>.json).

name.description: Human-readable entity name, e.g. "Binance" or "Rayon Labs".

source_urls.description: Independent proof this address belongs to the named entity (e.g. an official announcement, a block explorer's own tag, the entity's own published address list). A claim with no proof is not accepted.

review.description: Human-governance axis ONLY, same shape and meaning as a subnet surface's own `review` block -- a label enters as "community-submitted"; a maintainer promotes it to "maintainer-reviewed" or marks it "rejected".
